title: potentilla egedii var. euegedii
intro: Potentilla egedii var. euegedii, also known as Arctic Cinquefoil, is a perennial plant native to the Arctic tundra. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Arctic Cinquefoil include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate coughs, and soothe skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although its availability and usage may be limited due to its rare and protected status in some regions.
